did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper did not use AI to obtain its own study results. It is a clinical reader study assessing human diagnostic accuracy for pigmented actinic keratosis and Bowen's disease based on perilesional sun damage. While the authors reference previous work where explainable AI demonstrated increased background attention for these lesions, the current study's methodology involves human raters, interrater agreement analysis, and an online tutorial intervention, not AI-based classification or prediction.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
